div1.entryFree: Pore, to look intently and closely: painfully to p. upon a book, LLL I, 1, 74. dream and p. and thereon look, IV, 3, 298. creeping murmur and the --ing dark fills the wide vessel of the universe, H5 IV Chor. 2, i. e. straining its eyes and yet seeing only the nearest things, purblind (i. e. pore-blind).*
